## Meeting Purpose

[Interviewing Lucy Castaneda for an Account Strategist role.](https://fathom.video/share/DqEgEKCvpxiuQwigd9JBtTDwQFd1b9vC?tab=summary&timestamp=152.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Current Role:** At SEMrush, Lucy Castaneda is an enterprise Account Strategist (pre-sales, post-sales, technical implementation) focused on upsells, not renewals.](https://fathom.video/share/DqEgEKCvpxiuQwigd9JBtTDwQFd1b9vC?tab=summary&timestamp=436.0)
  - [**Career Goal:** Seeks a strategic role at a growing startup to make a direct impact, contrasting with the defined lanes and slower growth of her current 4,000+ employee company.](https://fathom.video/share/DqEgEKCvpxiuQwigd9JBtTDwQFd1b9vC?tab=summary&timestamp=1404.0)
  - [**Hiring Decision:** Bridget McGillivray noted Castaneda's experience is not a direct match for the renewal-focused AM role but is highly relevant. McGillivray will consult Andy (Customer Ops) on moving forward, potentially for a future sales role.](https://fathom.video/share/DqEgEKCvpxiuQwigd9JBtTDwQFd1b9vC?tab=summary&timestamp=1738.0)

## Topics

### Candidate's Current Role & Experience

  - [**Company:** SEMrush, Enterprise Account Strategist.](https://fathom.video/share/DqEgEKCvpxiuQwigd9JBtTDwQFd1b9vC?tab=summary&timestamp=244.0)
  - [**Scope:** Manages enterprise accounts (\>1,000 employees); not mid-market.](https://fathom.video/share/DqEgEKCvpxiuQwigd9JBtTDwQFd1b9vC?tab=summary&timestamp=436.0)
  - [**Responsibilities:**](https://fathom.video/share/DqEgEKCvpxiuQwigd9JBtTDwQFd1b9vC?tab=summary&timestamp=436.0)
      - [**Pre-sales:** Consultative upsells → identifies gaps and recommends additional SEMrush tools.](https://fathom.video/share/DqEgEKCvpxiuQwigd9JBtTDwQFd1b9vC?tab=summary&timestamp=547.0)
      - [**Post-sales:** Technical implementation → sets up new client instances (SEO/AI platforms).](https://fathom.video/share/DqEgEKCvpxiuQwigd9JBtTDwQFd1b9vC?tab=summary&timestamp=478.0)
      - [**Commercial:** Handles order forms and contracts.](https://fathom.video/share/DqEgEKCvpxiuQwigd9JBtTDwQFd1b9vC?tab=summary&timestamp=436.0)
  - [**Process:**](https://fathom.video/share/DqEgEKCvpxiuQwigd9JBtTDwQFd1b9vC?tab=summary&timestamp=786.0)
      - [Uses backend data to analyze client usage and identify upsell potential.](https://fathom.video/share/DqEgEKCvpxiuQwigd9JBtTDwQFd1b9vC?tab=summary&timestamp=786.0)
      - [Presents data-driven proposals to clients.](https://fathom.video/share/DqEgEKCvpxiuQwigd9JBtTDwQFd1b9vC?tab=summary&timestamp=786.0)
      - [Manages technical setup post-sale, including data migration and audits.](https://fathom.video/share/DqEgEKCvpxiuQwigd9JBtTDwQFd1b9vC?tab=summary&timestamp=912.0)
  - [**Strategy Support:**](https://fathom.video/share/DqEgEKCvpxiuQwigd9JBtTDwQFd1b9vC?tab=summary&timestamp=998.0)
      - [Provides simple keyword audits and 10-keyword lists.](https://fathom.video/share/DqEgEKCvpxiuQwigd9JBtTDwQFd1b9vC?tab=summary&timestamp=998.0)
      - [For extensive strategy (e.g., 5,000 keywords), refers clients to SEMrush's Professional Services team.](https://fathom.video/share/DqEgEKCvpxiuQwigd9JBtTDwQFd1b9vC?tab=summary&timestamp=1046.0)

### Candidate's Motivation & Fit

  - [**Career Goal:** Transition from a defined role at a large company to a strategic position at a growing startup.](https://fathom.video/share/DqEgEKCvpxiuQwigd9JBtTDwQFd1b9vC?tab=summary&timestamp=1404.0)
      - [**Rationale:** Seeks to make a direct impact and accelerate career growth, contrasting with her current company's slower pace and fixed culture.](https://fathom.video/share/DqEgEKCvpxiuQwigd9JBtTDwQFd1b9vC?tab=summary&timestamp=1404.0)
  - [**Interest in Role:**](https://fathom.video/share/DqEgEKCvpxiuQwigd9JBtTDwQFd1b9vC?tab=summary&timestamp=1404.0)
      - [**Remote:** Aligns with her Austin, TX location.](https://fathom.video/share/DqEgEKCvpxiuQwigd9JBtTDwQFd1b9vC?tab=summary&timestamp=1404.0)
      - [**Growth Trajectory:** Impressed by the company's recent Series A funding ($12M) and client list (e.g., Udemy).](https://fathom.video/share/DqEgEKCvpxiuQwigd9JBtTDwQFd1b9vC?tab=summary&timestamp=1691.0)
      - [**Global Presence:** Experience with international clients (Spain, LatAm) and Spanish fluency are a strong match.](https://fathom.video/share/DqEgEKCvpxiuQwigd9JBtTDwQFd1b9vC?tab=summary&timestamp=1473.0)
  - [**Mindset:** Highly adaptable and data-driven, viewing human creativity and data as complementary.](https://fathom.video/share/DqEgEKCvpxiuQwigd9JBtTDwQFd1b9vC?tab=summary&timestamp=1266.0)
      - [**AI Use:** Primarily for research and strategy (e.g., breaking into accounts), not for generating emails.](https://fathom.video/share/DqEgEKCvpxiuQwigd9JBtTDwQFd1b9vC?tab=summary&timestamp=1312.0)

### Hiring Manager's Assessment

  - [**Role Mismatch:** The Account Strategist role at SEMrush is focused on upsells, not the customer renewals that are a key requirement for this Account Manager position.](https://fathom.video/share/DqEgEKCvpxiuQwigd9JBtTDwQFd1b9vC?tab=summary&timestamp=1759.0)
  - [**Strong Potential:** Despite the mismatch, McGillivray sees high value in Castaneda's mindset and experience.](https://fathom.video/share/DqEgEKCvpxiuQwigd9JBtTDwQFd1b9vC?tab=summary&timestamp=1759.0)
      - [**Rationale:** The core skills for renewals (delivering value, building relationships) are present, making the learning curve manageable.](https://fathom.video/share/DqEgEKCvpxiuQwigd9JBtTDwQFd1b9vC?tab=summary&timestamp=1759.0)
      - [**Flexibility:** A future sales role may also be a good fit.](https://fathom.video/share/DqEgEKCvpxiuQwigd9JBtTDwQFd1b9vC?tab=summary&timestamp=1814.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Bridget McGillivray:** Consult with Andy (Customer Operations) on moving forward with Castaneda, explaining the role mismatch but highlighting the strong potential.](https://fathom.video/share/DqEgEKCvpxiuQwigd9JBtTDwQFd1b9vC?tab=summary&timestamp=1814.0)
  - [**Bridget McGillivray:** Follow up with Castaneda within 1-2 days with a decision.](https://fathom.video/share/DqEgEKCvpxiuQwigd9JBtTDwQFd1b9vC?tab=summary&timestamp=1940.0)
